milestoneTitle: Phase M9.16b — Link-in-modal. External <a> clicks open inside a sandboxed doc-modal instead of navigating away; YouTube links route to the existing video modal. Back-gesture + ESC + backdrop + X all close cleanly and restore scroll position. Prominent 'Open in new tab ↗' escape hatch for sites that block iframe embedding. Focus trap + favicon + aria polish held for M9.16c.
